definitions: To begin to happen or function.
To encourage someone to do something or to hurry.
To appear on stage or enter a scene (for a performer).
To start broadcasting (for a program or show).
To try to attract someone sexually.
examples: The rain started to come on.
How is your project coming on?
Come on, we're going to be late!
The band will come on in five minutes.
What time does your favorite show come on?
He was really coming on to her at the party.
